title: useDisclosure

`,(0,o.jsx)(r,{name:"use-disclosure",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState, useCallback } from "react";\r
\r
export function useDisclosure(initialState = false, callbacks?: { onOpen?(): void; onClose?(): void }) {\r
  const { onOpen, onClose } = callbacks || {};\r
  const [opened, setOpened] = useState(initialState);\r
\r
  const open = useCallback(() => {\r
    setOpened(isOpened => {\r
      if (!isOpened) {\r
        onOpen?.();\r
        return true;\r
      }\r
      return isOpened;\r
    });\r
  }, [onOpen]);\r
\r
  const close = useCallback(() => {\r
    setOpened(isOpened => {\r
      if (isOpened) {\r
        onClose?.();\r
        return false;\r
      }\r
      return isOpened;\r
    });\r
  }, [onClose]);\r
\r
  const toggle = useCallback(() => {\r
    if (opened) close();\r
    else open();\r
  }, [close, open, opened]);\r
\r
  return [opened, { open, close, toggle }] as const;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-disclosure.ts"})]})}function p(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,o.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,o.jsx)(d,{...n})}):d(n)}function O(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return w(v);})();
